panels.description: Shows temperature conditions for the greenhouse.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, temp_avg AS "Temp" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.title: Indoor Avg Temp

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit, one of the most important plant-stress metrics.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, vpd_avg AS "VPD" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.title: Indoor VPD
Controller State

targets.rawSql:
WITH state_map(state, code) AS (
  VALUES
    ('IDLE', 1),
    ('VENTILATE', 2),
    ('THERMAL_RELIEF', 3),
    ('DEHUM_VENT', 4),
    ('SEALED_MIST_S1', 5),
    ('SEALED_MIST_S2', 6),
    ('SEALED_MIST_FOG', 7),
    ('SEALED_MIST_WATCH', 8),
    ('TEMP_IDLE_HUM_IDLE', 9),
    ('TEMP_IDLE_HUMID_S1', 10),
    ('TEMP_IDLE_VPD_WATCH', 11),
    ('HEAT_S1_HUM_IDLE', 12),
    ('HEAT_S1_HUMID_S1', 13),
    ('HEAT_S1_VPD_WATCH', 14),
    ('HEAT_S2_HUM_IDLE', 15),
    ('HEAT_S2_HUMID_S1', 16),
    ('HEAT_S2_VPD_WATCH', 17),
    ('COOL_S1_HUM_IDLE', 18),
    ('COOL_S1_HUMID_S1', 19),
    ('COOL_S1_HUMID_S2', 20),
    ('COOL_S1_VPD_WATCH', 21),
    ('COOL_S2_HUMID_S1', 22),
    ('COOL_S2_HUMID_S2', 23),
    ('SAFETY_COOL', 24)
)
SELECT
  now() AS time,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT sm.code
    FROM v_greenhouse_now g
    LEFT JOIN state_map sm ON sm.state = g.state
    LIMIT 1
  ), 0) AS "State";

panels.description: Current ESP32 controller state from the live greenhouse snapshot, rendered through numeric value mappings so Grafana static images do not drop string-only stats.

panels.title: $/Day (30-Day Avg)

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(AVG(cost_total)::numeric, 2) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= current_date - interval '30 days' AND date < current_date AND cost_total IS NOT NULL

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(cost_total::numeric, 2) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE date = current_date

Trailing 30-day daily cost stacked by utility type.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, COALESCE(cost_electric, 0) AS "Electric"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) ORDER BY date

SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, COALESCE(cost_gas, 0) AS "Gas"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) ORDER BY date

SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, COALESCE(cost_water, 0) AS "Water"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) ORDER BY date

panels.title: Daily Cost by Type

panels.description: Measured greenhouse electrical load overlaid with available solar radiation, showing when electric work lands during solar-rich windows.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('30 minutes', e.ts) AS time, round(avg(watts_total)::numeric, 0) AS "Greenhouse (W)" FROM energy e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('30 minutes', ts) AS time, round(avg(solar_irradiance_w_m2)::numeric, 0) AS "Solar (W/m²)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Electric Load vs Solar Irradiance

panels.description: Daily percent of samples inside the temperature band, VPD band, and both bands at the same time. Percent units only; no stress-hour scaling.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time,
       temp_compliance_pct AS "Temp Compliance %",
       vpd_compliance_pct AS "VPD Compliance %",
       compliance_pct AS "Total Compliance %"
FROM v_planner_performance
WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz)
ORDER BY date

panels.title: Planner Compliance Trend — Temp, VPD, Total

panels.description: Daily hours outside the temperature band, outside the VPD band, and total stress hours. Hours are time, not percent, and are not scaled.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time,
       round((heat_stress_h + cold_stress_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Temp Stress Hours",
       round((vpd_high_stress_h + vpd_low_stress_h)::numeric, 2) AS "VPD Stress Hours",
       round(total_stress_h::numeric, 2) AS "Total Stress-Category Hours"
FROM v_planner_performance
WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz)
ORDER BY date

panels.title: Planner Stress-Category Hours — Temp, VPD, Total

panels.description: Indoor temperature against the forecast-driven target band. Pale green fill marks the target safe zone; gray line shows outdoor temperature for context.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ts AS time,
    avg(temp_avg) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 14 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "Indoor Temp"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor Forecast"
 FROM climate WHERE outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
     date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
     temp_f::float AS "Outdoor Forecast"
 FROM weather_forecast
 WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
 ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time

WITH timeline AS (
    SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '30 minutes') AS ts
)
SELECT t.ts AS time,
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).temp_low::float AS "Band Low",
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).temp_high::float AS "Band High"
FROM timeline t ORDER BY t.ts

SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM climate WHERE solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
    date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, solar_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM weather_forecast WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 82 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 1" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fan1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 84 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 2" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fan2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 86 ELSE NULL END AS "Fog" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 58 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 1 (Electric)" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 56 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 2 (Gas)" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT now() AS time, NULL::double precision AS "Outdoor Forecast (dashed gray)"

panels.title: Temperature Target Band and Forecast

panels.description: Indoor VPD against the forecast-driven target band. Pale green fill marks the target safe zone; gray line shows outdoor VPD for context.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ts AS time,
    avg(vpd_avg) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "Indoor VPD"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time,
     (0.6108 * EXP(17.27 * ((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8) / (((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8)+237.3)) * (1.0 - outdoor_rh_pct/100.0))::float AS "Outdoor VPD Forecast"
 FROM climate WHERE outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
     date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
     vpd_kpa::float AS "Outdoor VPD Forecast"
 FROM weather_forecast
 WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
 ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time

WITH timeline AS (
    SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '30 minutes') AS ts
)
SELECT t.ts AS time,
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).vpd_low::float AS "Band Low",
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).vpd_high::float AS "Band High"
FROM timeline t ORDER BY t.ts

SELECT ts AS time,
    (0.6108 * EXP(17.27 * ((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8) / (((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8)+237.3)) * (1.0 - outdoor_rh_pct/100.0))::float AS "Outdoor VPD"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM climate WHERE solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
    date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, solar_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM weather_forecast WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.8 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister South" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_south' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.9 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister West" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_west' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 2.0 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister Center" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 2.1 ELSE NULL END AS "Fog" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT now() AS time, NULL::double precision AS "Outdoor VPD Forecast (dashed gray)"

panels.title: VPD Target Band and Forecast

panels.description: Daily Light Integral accumulation vs crop target. Yellow background shows solar irradiance. Grow light state bars show when supplemental lighting is active.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, dli_today AS "DLI Today" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND dli_today IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar Irradiance" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '1 hour') AS time, 14.0 AS "DLI Target"

(SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM climate WHERE solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
    date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, solar_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM weather_forecast WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC) ORDER BY time
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.0 ELSE NULL END AS "Grow Light Main" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='grow_light_main' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 0.5 ELSE NULL END AS "Grow Light Grow" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='grow_light_grow' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: 30-Day Water Cost

panels.description: Heat 2 relay runtime converted to therms per minute with a 30-minute trailing average, overlaid with 30-minute average solar radiation.

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS raw_from_ts,
    ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 minutes') AS from_ts,
    $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_ts
), events AS (
  SELECT from_ts AS ts,
         COALESCE((SELECT state FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat2' AND ts <= from_ts ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), false) AS state
  FROM bounds
  UNION ALL
  SELECT es.ts, es.state
  FROM equipment_state es, bounds
  WHERE es.equipment='heat2' AND es.ts > bounds.from_ts AND es.ts < bounds.to_ts
  UNION ALL
  SELECT to_ts, false FROM bounds
), intervals AS (
  SELECT ts AS start_ts, lead(ts) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS end_ts, state
  FROM events
), buckets AS (
  SELECT gs AS bucket_start, gs + interval '1 minute' AS bucket_end
  FROM bounds, generate_series(time_bucket('1 minute', from_ts), to_ts, interval '1 minute') AS gs
), minute_rates AS (
  SELECT b.bucket_start AS time,
         (SUM(
           CASE
             WHEN i.start_ts IS NULL OR i.end_ts IS NULL THEN 0
             ELSE GREATEST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM LEAST(i.end_ts, b.bucket_end) - GREATEST(i.start_ts, b.bucket_start)), 0) / 3600.0
           END
         ) * 75000 / 100000) AS therms_per_min
  FROM buckets b
  LEFT JOIN intervals i
    ON i.state IS TRUE
   AND i.end_ts IS NOT NULL
   AND i.start_ts < b.bucket_end
   AND i.end_ts > b.bucket_start
  GROUP BY b.bucket_start
), smoothed AS (
  SELECT time,
         AVG(therms_per_min) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS therms_per_min_30m
  FROM minute_rates
)
SELECT time,
       ROUND(therms_per_min_30m::numeric, 5) AS "Gas 30-min avg (therms/min)"
FROM smoothed, bounds
WHERE time >= bounds.raw_from_ts
ORDER BY time

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS raw_from_ts,
    ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 minutes') AS from_ts,
    $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_ts
), minute_rates AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS time,
         AVG(solar_irradiance_w_m2) AS solar_w_m2
  FROM climate, bounds
  WHERE ts >= bounds.from_ts
    AND ts <= bounds.to_ts
    AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), smoothed AS (
  SELECT time,
         AVG(solar_w_m2) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS solar_w_m2_30m
  FROM minute_rates
)
SELECT time,
       ROUND(solar_w_m2_30m::numeric, 0) AS "Solar 30-min avg (W/m²)"
FROM smoothed, bounds
WHERE time >= bounds.raw_from_ts
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Gas Therms/min vs Solar Irradiance

panels.description: Flow-meter gallons per minute with a 30-minute trailing average, overlaid with 30-minute average solar radiation.

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS raw_from_ts,
    ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 minutes') AS from_ts,
    $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_ts
), minute_rates AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS time,
         AVG(GREATEST(flow_gpm, 0)) AS water_gpm
  FROM climate, bounds
  WHERE ts >= bounds.from_ts
    AND ts <= bounds.to_ts
    AND flow_gpm IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), smoothed AS (
  SELECT time,
         AVG(water_gpm) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS water_gpm_30m
  FROM minute_rates
)
SELECT time,
       ROUND(water_gpm_30m::numeric, 3) AS "Water 30-min avg (gpm)"
FROM smoothed, bounds
WHERE time >= bounds.raw_from_ts
ORDER BY time

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS raw_from_ts,
    ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 minutes') AS from_ts,
    $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_ts
), minute_rates AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS time,
         AVG(solar_irradiance_w_m2) AS solar_w_m2
  FROM climate, bounds
  WHERE ts >= bounds.from_ts
    AND ts <= bounds.to_ts
    AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), smoothed AS (
  SELECT time,
         AVG(solar_w_m2) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS solar_w_m2_30m
  FROM minute_rates
)
SELECT time,
       ROUND(solar_w_m2_30m::numeric, 0) AS "Solar 30-min avg (W/m²)"
FROM smoothed, bounds
WHERE time >= bounds.raw_from_ts
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Water GPM vs Solar Irradiance
Solar vs Resource Use
panels.description: Combined 30-minute smoothed view: solar irradiance, outdoor temperature and humidity, electric energy, Heat 2 gas rate, and water flow.

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS raw_from_ts,
    ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 minutes') AS from_ts,
    $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_ts
), five_min AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ts) AS time,
         AVG(solar_irradiance_w_m2) AS solar_w_m2
  FROM climate, bounds
  WHERE ts >= bounds.from_ts
    AND ts <= bounds.to_ts
    AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), smoothed AS (
  SELECT time,
         AVG(solar_w_m2) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 5 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS solar_30m
  FROM five_min
)
SELECT time,
       ROUND(solar_30m::numeric, 0) AS "Solar"
FROM smoothed, bounds
WHERE time >= bounds.raw_from_ts
  AND ${show_solar:raw} = 1
ORDER BY time

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS raw_from_ts,
    ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 minutes') AS from_ts,
    $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_ts
), five_min AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ts) AS time,
         AVG(GREATEST(watts_total, 0)) / 1000.0 * (5.0 / 60.0) AS kwh_5m
  FROM energy, bounds
  WHERE ts >= bounds.from_ts
    AND ts <= bounds.to_ts
    AND watts_total IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), smoothed AS (
  SELECT time,
         SUM(kwh_5m) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 5 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS kwh_30m
  FROM five_min
)
SELECT time,
       ROUND(kwh_30m::numeric, 4) AS "Electric"
FROM smoothed, bounds
WHERE time >= bounds.raw_from_ts
  AND ${show_electric:raw} = 1
ORDER BY time

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS raw_from_ts,
    ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 minutes') AS from_ts,
    $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_ts
), events AS (
  SELECT from_ts AS ts,
         COALESCE((SELECT state FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat2' AND ts <= from_ts ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), false) AS state
  FROM bounds
  UNION ALL
  SELECT es.ts, es.state
  FROM equipment_state es, bounds
  WHERE es.equipment='heat2' AND es.ts > bounds.from_ts AND es.ts < bounds.to_ts
  UNION ALL
  SELECT to_ts, false FROM bounds
), intervals AS (
  SELECT ts AS start_ts, lead(ts) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS end_ts, state
  FROM events
), buckets AS (
  SELECT gs AS bucket_start, gs + interval '5 minutes' AS bucket_end
  FROM bounds, generate_series(time_bucket('5 minutes', from_ts), to_ts, interval '5 minutes') AS gs
), five_min AS (
  SELECT b.bucket_start AS time,
         SUM(
           CASE
             WHEN i.start_ts IS NULL OR i.end_ts IS NULL THEN 0
             ELSE GREATEST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM LEAST(i.end_ts, b.bucket_end) - GREATEST(i.start_ts, b.bucket_start)), 0) / 3600.0
           END
         ) * 75000 / 100000 AS therms_5m
  FROM buckets b
  LEFT JOIN intervals i
    ON i.state IS TRUE
   AND i.end_ts IS NOT NULL
   AND i.start_ts < b.bucket_end
   AND i.end_ts > b.bucket_start
  GROUP BY b.bucket_start
), smoothed AS (
  SELECT time,
         SUM(therms_5m) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 5 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) / 30.0 AS therms_per_min_30m
  FROM five_min
)
SELECT time,
       ROUND(therms_per_min_30m::numeric, 5) AS "Gas"
FROM smoothed, bounds
WHERE time >= bounds.raw_from_ts
  AND ${show_gas:raw} = 1
ORDER BY time

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS raw_from_ts,
    ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 minutes') AS from_ts,
    $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_ts
), five_min AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ts) AS time,
         AVG(GREATEST(flow_gpm, 0)) AS water_gpm
  FROM climate, bounds
  WHERE ts >= bounds.from_ts
    AND ts <= bounds.to_ts
    AND flow_gpm IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), smoothed AS (
  SELECT time,
         AVG(water_gpm) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 5 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS water_gpm_30m
  FROM five_min
)
SELECT time,
       ROUND(water_gpm_30m::numeric, 3) AS "Water"
FROM smoothed, bounds
WHERE time >= bounds.raw_from_ts
  AND ${show_water:raw} = 1
ORDER BY time

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS raw_from_ts,
    ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 minutes') AS from_ts,
    $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_ts
), five_min AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ts) AS time,
         AVG(outdoor_temp_f) AS outdoor_temp_f
  FROM climate, bounds
  WHERE ts >= bounds.from_ts
    AND ts <= bounds.to_ts
    AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), smoothed AS (
  SELECT time,
         AVG(outdoor_temp_f) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 5 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS temp_30m
  FROM five_min
)
SELECT time,
       ROUND(temp_30m::numeric, 1) AS "Temp"
FROM smoothed, bounds
WHERE time >= bounds.raw_from_ts
  AND ${show_temp:raw} = 1
ORDER BY time

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS raw_from_ts,
    ($__timeFrom()::timestamptz - interval '30 minutes') AS from_ts,
    $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_ts
), five_min AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ts) AS time,
         AVG(outdoor_rh_pct) AS outdoor_rh_pct
  FROM climate, bounds
  WHERE ts >= bounds.from_ts
    AND ts <= bounds.to_ts
    AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), smoothed AS (
  SELECT time,
         AVG(outdoor_rh_pct) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 5 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rh_30m
  FROM five_min
)
SELECT time,
       ROUND(rh_30m::numeric, 1) AS "Humidity"
FROM smoothed, bounds
WHERE time >= bounds.raw_from_ts
  AND ${show_humidity:raw} = 1
ORDER BY time
